description: Founded in 1914, Lake Washington School District is the administrative body responsible for planning and managing public education for 33 elementary, 14 middle, and 9 high schools. It serves communities of Kirkland, Redmond and about half of Sammamish. The company is headquartered in Redmond, Washington.
